text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during training...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed that your recent training sessions
have centered on improving your trainee's
breathing mid-race.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You've also taken to slope training, which builds
stamina and emphasizes endurance over speed...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Are you perhaps planning on running a
long-distance race?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... You got me there. Nothing's been
announced publicly yet, so could you keep that
off the record?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'm here to ask about your trainee's
progress, nothing more.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer <username>.
It's nice to see you again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Otonashi is here to conduct
interviews for her magazine, but I'm noticing
something...
choice_data_list: You sure know a lot about Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Well, I am a reporter. It's my job to have a certain amount of background knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The more knowledgeable I am on the subject
matter, the better the articles I can write.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Miss Otonashi takes the subject of
Umamusume more seriously than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I do apologize. I've only been talking about
myself.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we've got the chance, would you mind
if I asked you about your trainee?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
What would you say is your next hurdle? It
doesn't have to be anything big.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For all that she insists she's just a reporter, her
expertise might come in handy.
choice_data_list: We're trying to work on strength.
We're trying to work on speed.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Strength, you say?! That's... simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Slope and weight training are both effective ways
of building strength.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But the most important thing by far is diet! Strong
and supple muscles are made in the kitchen!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So you must be hunting for the very best
ingredients! I'm talking long-lived Okinawan pork,
clifftop swallow's nests, and deep-sea fish from
the ocean floor... Ah, such devotion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(I think she might have gotten the wrong idea
there, but her comments about diet are very
useful.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deep-sea fish might be a little out of my budget,
but I later catch a white fish that's good for
building muscle and serve it to
<chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Speed, you say?! That's...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for speed, it's important to
manage your body fat percentage and reduce
your weight without losing muscle...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
However, that can be really tough, and some
Umamusume even get sick from the stress.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
That's why you have to make an effort to prevent
your trainee from getting stressed out!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So you must be sparing no expense! I'm talking
renting out amusement parks, luxury cruises, and
cross-continental overseas road trips... Ah, such
devotion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(I think she might have gotten the wrong idea
there, but her comments about reducing body fat
percentage are very useful.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cruises and overseas travel might be a little out
of my budget, but I make sure to give
<chrname> a chance to relax as a
reward for getting through our grueling training.
